title: EazyDiner is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: EazyDiner is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at EazyDiner are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About EazyDiner:
EazyDiner is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
